info.name: template-service
info.description:
REST API for retrieving and rendering notification templates.

Base URL: {{template_service_url}} (default: http://localhost:8002)

request.description:
Retrieves all templates in the database.

Response (200):
```json
[
  {
    "id": "order-confirm",
    "eventType": "ORDER_PLACED",
    "name": "Order Confirmation",
    "subject": "Your Order #{{orderId}} Confirmed",
    "body": "Thank you for your order {{orderId}}. Total: ${{amount}}",
    "version": 1,
    "active": true,
    "createdAt": "2026-01-01T00:00:00",
    "updatedAt": "2026-06-17T12:00:00"
  },
  {
    "id": "password-reset",
    "eventType": "PASSWORD_RESET",
    "name": "Password Reset",
    "subject": "Reset Your Password",
    "body": "Click the link to reset your password: {{resetLink}}",
    "version": 1,
    "active": true,
    "createdAt": "2026-01-01T00:00:00",
    "updatedAt": "2026-06-17T12:00:00"
  }
]
```

Retrieves a template by ID without rendering.

Response (200):
```json
{
  "id": "order-confirm",
  "eventType": "ORDER_PLACED",
  "name": "Order Confirmation",
  "subject": "Your Order #{{orderId}} Confirmed",
  "body": "Thank you for your order {{orderId}}. Total: ${{amount}}",
  "version": 1,
  "active": true,
  "createdAt": "2026-01-01T00:00:00",
  "updatedAt": "2026-06-17T12:00:00"
}
```

Response (404): Template not found.

Retrieves a template and renders it with the provided payload.

Response (200):
```json
{
  "templateId": "order-confirm",
  "content": "Your Order #ord-789 Confirmed\n\nThank you for your order ord-789. Total: $99.99"
}
```

Response (404): Template not found.
Response (400): Invalid payload or missing required variables.

Checks whether a template exists and is active.

HTTP 200: Template exists and is active.
HTTP 404: Template not found or inactive.

variable.description: Template ID - valid values: order-confirm, order-shipped, order-delivered, payment-failed, password-reset, account-created, user-invited, promotion-alert, fraud-alert, system-alert
